Summary: max over poses (degrees) of each backend's supplied attitude vs that derived from its own quaternion

Per-pose euler divergence: backend-supplied eulers vs eulers of the same backend's quaternion, trimmed phase (degrees; click headers to sort).
Cell colours use the sphere's Viridis scale: EKF columns saturate at 4 deg, DCM and matrix columns at 0.15 deg.
